---
title: Descriptive Statistics
date: 2026-03-04
date-format: long
published-title: "Last updateded on"
abstract: "This chapter introduces correlation analysis and how to compute it using R."
footer: "[Back to website](https://riegersven.github.io/library/working-with-data/correlation.html)"
---

::: {.callout-note title="This is work in progress..."}

Comming soon...

:::
